Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Sage is a rank or status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is a disciple of a Sage.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — There are only three Sages on the entire continent.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Sage was watching Kiro through her owl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage is expected to intervene.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Sage chose the team leader.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage sent a letter to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Sage intends to retrieve Eithan and others in approximately eight months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon refers to the Sage regarding the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin had Sage's protection in the past.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — A Sage is a title that people in Sacred Valley have vague stories about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The nature of Sages is a secret for anyone below Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — After the Uncrowned competition, there is a month of Sage training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Dross cannot yet comprehend the nature of Sage powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Sages are capable of ferrying people across great distances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sage's personal home is a complex of huts at the foot of a mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — To become a Sage, one must contact an Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Sages and Monarchs can command reality directly through their authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Authority is the scope of a Sage or Monarch's power related to their Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin asks the Blood Shadow if it is trying to beat her to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Reaching Sage was a different matter for Eithan than reaching Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The concept of a Sage was historically more fluid than it is today.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy is associated with the youngest Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Sage is a title used for Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has Sage senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Charity and Malice worked their Sage powers through their techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — The Sage brought a tool to the lands that serves as a key to a prison in the labyrinth.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The sect founder of the Sect of Twin Stars is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon holds the status of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — No one below Sage or Herald is believed to have the ability to survive and alter the labyrinth's workings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The owner of the white badge was a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Sages can send out techniques that blot out spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One addressed Lindon as a young Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Sages and Heralds are made to swear an oath when they come close to the truth or make progress in advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Sage is a destination or state one can reach.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The storm artist may have been on the verge of advancing to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel is not a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos has the protection of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — A Sage walked into Malice's strongholds.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon told Kahn Mala to call him Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Sage is a potential path or rank for Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Sages and Monarchs have authority bound up in their techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — A Sage called Lindon's name from within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Sage bodies cannot conduct willpower like a Herald's can.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos and Little Blue were a new Sage and Herald respectively.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The energy in the page might guide one to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — A blonde Sage with streaks of gray in her hair entered the vault.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The workings of a Sage would not disrupt the world too much.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
